messages.content:
林老师您好，我是您在上海交通大学的联培生卜家梓。
  
之前向您汇报的交大与南洋理工大学联合PhD项目，我已经向我在实验室的直属上级吴桐师姐报备。现在需要双方导师签署一份联培协议，可以请您在附件文件的第二面上附上您的电子签吗？
  
这里是关于联合PhD项目​的更多信息，请您参考：
  
[NTU项目主页] https://www.ntu.edu.sg/graduate-college/admissions/programme/Joint-PhD-Programmes
​
[SJTU项目主页] https://www.gs.sjtu.edu.cn/post/detail/Z3MzMTEz​
  
烦请您在百忙之中审阅并签署这份文件，感谢您的时间和支持！​
  
祝好！
卜家梓
  
帮我润色下

林老师您好，我是您在上海交通大学的联培生卜家梓。

此前向您汇报的上海交通大学—南洋理工大学联合 PhD 项目，我已向实验室直属上级吴桐师姐完成报备。目前需要双方导师签署联培协议，烦请您在附件文件第二页处签署电子签名。

为便于您了解项目相关信息，链接如下：  
- NTU 项目主页：https://www.ntu.edu.sg/graduate-college/admissions/programme/Joint-PhD-Programmes  
- SJTU 项目主页：https://www.gs.sjtu.edu.cn/post/detail/Z3MzMTEz

劳烦您在百忙之中审阅并签署，感谢您的时间与支持！

祝好  
卜家梓

林老师您好，我是您在上海交通大学的联培生卜家梓。
  
此前向您汇报的交大与南洋理工大学联合PhD项目，我已向实验室直属上级吴桐师姐完成报备。目前需要中外双方导师签署一份联培协议，可以请您在附件文件第二页处签署您的电子签名吗？根据NTU项目组要求，需要在周三之前完成反馈。
  
为便于您了解项目相关信息，项目相关链接如下：
  
[NTU项目主页] https://www.ntu.edu.sg/graduate-college/admissions/programme/Joint-PhD-Programmes
  
[SJTU项目主页] https://www.gs.sjtu.edu.cn/post/detail/Z3MzMTEz
  
烦请您在百忙之中审阅并签署这份文件，感谢您的时间和支持！
  
祝好！
卜家梓
  
时间这里润色下

林老师您好，我是您在上海交通大学的联培生卜家梓。

此前向您汇报的上海交通大学与南洋理工大学联合 PhD 项目，我已向实验室直属上级吴桐师姐完成报备。目前需要中外双方导师签署联培协议，烦请您在附件文件第二页处签署电子签名。根据 NTU 项目组的时间安排，需于本周三前提交反馈，若您方便，恳请您在周三（含）前签署并回传。

为便于您了解项目相关信息，链接如下：  
- NTU 项目主页：https://www.ntu.edu.sg/graduate-college/admissions/programme/Joint-PhD-Programmes  
- SJTU 项目主页：https://www.gs.sjtu.edu.cn/post/detail/Z3MzMTEz

劳烦您在百忙之中审阅并签署，感谢您的时间与支持！

祝好  
卜家梓

林老师好，抱歉多次打扰您。今天接交大国际办邮件，我此前申请的交大南洋理工大学联培PhD项目需要在这周三之前完成双方导师的协议签署。若您方便，可以请您在周三前审阅并签署这份文件吗？
  
润色下

林老师您好，抱歉多次打扰您。

我今天收到交大国际办邮件通知，我此前申请的上海交通大学—南洋理工大学联合培养 PhD 项目需在本周三前完成双方导师的协议签署。若您方便，烦请您在周三（含）前审阅并签署附件文件，并回传给我/相关负责人。

感谢您的时间与支持！  
祝好  
卜家梓

林老师好，抱歉多次打扰您。
我今天收到交大国际办邮件通知，此前向您和吴桐师姐汇报的交大南洋理工大学联培PhD项目需要在这周三之前完成双方导师的协议签署，需要您的一个电子签名。若您方便，可以请您在周三前审阅并签署这份文件吗？

林老师您好，抱歉多次打扰您。

我今天收到交大国际办邮件通知：此前向您和吴桐师姐汇报的上海交通大学—南洋理工大学联合培养 PhD 项目，需要在本周三前完成双方导师的联培协议签署，其中需要您在附件文件中签署一处电子签名。若您方便，烦请您在周三（含）前审阅并签署该文件，并回传给我。

感谢您的时间与支持！  
祝好  
卜家梓

林老师好，抱歉多次打扰您。
我今天收到交大国际办邮件通知，此前向您和吴桐师姐汇报的交大南洋理工大学联培PhD项目需要在这周三之前完成双方导师的协议签署，其中需要您的电子签名。若您方便，可以请您在周三前审阅并签署这份文件吗？由于文件比较紧急，如您事务繁忙，也可以授权您在lab的秘书加盖电子签
感谢您的时间与支持！

林老师您好，抱歉多次打扰您。

我今天收到交大国际办邮件通知：此前向您和吴桐师姐汇报的上海交通大学—南洋理工大学联合培养 PhD 项目，需在本周三前完成双方导师的联培协议签署，其中需要您在附件文件中签署电子签名。若您方便，烦请您在周三（含）前审阅并签署该文件。

由于时间较紧，若您近期事务繁忙，也想请问是否可以由实验室秘书代为加盖您的电子签/签章（如流程允许），以便按时提交。

感谢您的时间与支持！  
祝好  
卜家梓

林老师您好，抱歉多次打扰您。
我今天收到交大国际办邮件通知：此前向您和吴桐师姐汇报的交大南洋理工联培PhD项目，需在本周三前完成双方导师的联培协议签署，其中需要您在附件文件中签署电子签名。
由于时间较紧，若您近期事务繁忙，也想请问是否可以请您授权实验室秘书代为加盖您的电子签，以便按时提交。
感谢您的时间与支持！这是具体的协议文件：

林老师您好，抱歉多次打扰您。

我今天收到交大国际办邮件通知：此前向您和吴桐师姐汇报的上海交通大学—南洋理工联合培养 PhD 项目，需在本周三前完成双方导师的联培协议签署，其中需要您在附件文件中签署电子签名。

由于时间较紧，若您近期事务繁忙，也想请问是否方便授权实验室秘书代为加盖您的电子签/签章（如流程允许），以便按时提交。

感谢您的时间与支持！附件为具体协议文件，烦请您查收。  
祝好  
卜家梓
老师回我了，帮我写一句感谢
谢谢林老师的及时回复与协助，给您添麻烦了，我会尽快按要求推进后续流程。

老师您好，我是卜家梓。
我已完成中方导师签字，请见邮件附件。
文件如有问题，请随时联系我。
祝好！
卜家梓
学号: 025033910027
Tel: 13995523308
E-mail: bujiazi001@sjtu.edu.cn
  
润色下

老师您好，我是卜家梓。

中方导师签字已完成，签署后的文件请见邮件附件。如文件内容或格式需要补充/修改，敬请随时联系我。

祝好！  
卜家梓  
学号：025033910027  
Tel：13995523308  
E-mail：bujiazi001@sjtu.edu.cn

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects (e.g., motion control and light control for diffusion models) and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.
为了能够获得充分的学术指导的充足的计算资源, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as model acceleration methods such as feature caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have been accepted by top-tier AI conferences and received encouraging recognition from the AIGC community, which has further strengthened my determination to continue advanced study in this area

In the past few years, I have steadily built research experience in this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC projects (e.g., motion and lighting control for diffusion models) and publishing at top-tier international conferences. To receive strong academic mentorship and access to

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects (e.g., motion control and light control for diffusion models) and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
为了能够获得充分的学术指导的充足的计算资源， 我在上海人工智能实验室进行实习, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as model acceleration methods such as feature caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have been accepted by top-tier AI conferences and received encouraging recognition from the AIGC community, which has further strengthened my determination to continue advanced study in this area

In the past few years, I have steadily built research experience in this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC projects (e.g., motion and lighting control for diffusion models) and publishing at top-tier international conferences. To access strong academic mentorship and ample computational resources, I undertook a research internship at the Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. During these projects, I encountered several practical challenges, including the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues by exploring training-free techniques that better leverage a model’s intrinsic capabilities without retraining, as well as acceleration methods such as feature caching and sparse computation. These efforts have led to papers accepted by top-tier AI conferences and have received encouraging recognition from the AIGC community, further strengthening my determination to pursue advanced study in this area.

In the past few years, I have steadily built up research experience toward this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC research projects (e.g., motion control and light control for diffusion models) and publishing at top-tier international academic conferences.  
为了能够获得AIGC方面的充分的学术指导的充足的计算资源， 我在上海人工智能实验室进行实习, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. In these researches, I encountered several challenging practical difficulties, such as the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues through in-depth exploration of training-free techniques that better leverage the model's intrinsic capabilities instead of model re-training, as well as model acceleration methods such as feature caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have been accepted by top-tier AI conferences and received encouraging recognition from the AIGC community, which has further strengthened my determination to continue advanced study in this area

In the past few years, I have steadily built research experience in this direction by actively participating in multiple cutting-edge AIGC projects (e.g., motion and lighting control for diffusion models) and publishing at top-tier international conferences. To obtain stronger academic mentorship in AIGC and access to ample computational resources, I completed a research internship at the Shanghai AI Laboratory, where I focused exclusively on generative diffusion models. During these projects, I encountered several practical challenges, including the scarcity of high-quality training data and the slow inference speed of large-scale models. I addressed these issues by exploring training-free techniques that better leverage a model’s intrinsic capabilities without retraining, as well as acceleration methods such as feature caching and sparse computation. These research outcomes have been accepted by top-tier AI conferences and have received encouraging recognition from the AIGC community, further strengthening my determination to pursue advanced study in this area.

老师您好，我是卜家梓。
在接到面试通过的通知后，我已完成：
1. 中方导师签字。我已联系导师完成协议签署，文件已随昨天的邮件发送给您，请您查收。
2. 网申系统填报和缴费。我已完成NTU网申系统的填报和缴费，申请完毕后的系统截图pdf已随本邮件附件发送给您。
此次来信除了向您汇报进度外，还想咨询一下，有关申请后续流程，如果需要补充/更改申请材料，您或者NTU相关老师会联系我们申请人吗？
  
润色下

老师您好，我是卜家梓。

收到面试通过通知后，我已完成以下事项：  
1. **中方导师签字**：已联系导师完成协议签署，签署文件已随我昨天的邮件发送给您，烦请查收。  
2. **网申系统填报与缴费**：已完成 NTU 网申系统的填报和缴费，提交后的系统截图 PDF 已作为本邮件附件发送给您。

此外，想向您咨询后续流程：如后续需要补充或修改申请材料，届时是由您或 NTU 相关老师直接与我们申请人联系通知吗？

感谢您的时间与帮助！  
祝好  
卜家梓
